title: Windows 98 Cursors
description: This changes the default cursors from Minecraft Cursors to the DOS days of Windows.
body:
## Info
This is a resource pack that changes the default Cursor to be more like Windows 3.1 to Windows XP.
## Preview
![defaultcursor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdb9fc10816e85ea27569f21ed4b5a7f01191112.png)![pointer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff1f1bacd6ddfd425475cbd0c080860ec274ae0.png)![shift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3de858d2f428a5e352751b92b1298d8562d2390.png) ![grabbing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de72dc418489acc7b49bc530e0bbe0a75421793b.png) ![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37a74c61a4d307becdd70570e6f026f139fe5ec4.png)![ghostbusters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc79573c8bccdd0aeb3e260a468c90cfbc7ed81e.png)![crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/079ae77434c1b49e334d703bd9efbdab9d41ff9e.png)![resizeall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcb4b1c82715f84e34e7c33d4cf06023ab6ec4dc.png)![resizens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cea71fb1b41f02e2b7d27f6e712eb923f4419d51.png)![resizeew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8827c238b0dbd4c8a1e8e439453de6f042376bb4.png)![resizenesw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a229ceea22a819e7b42e35b5ffc69cb4ac21ac9.png)![resizenwse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f1de75dd1b0b36c0bce581b7b41da09838abd09.png)
## Requirements
This requires [Minecraft Cursors](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)  
it's just that simple. :)
